'''''Implacable''''' was the name given to an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] simulator mission.

The mission objectives were to destroy a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] supply base to draw the light Mon Calamari Cruiser ''[[Ardent]]'' into an ambush. ''Implacable'' would drop out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] before the supply depot and launch TIE Interceptors and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. The bombers would attack the [[XQ3 Platform|space station]] ''[[AZ 77]]'', while the interceptors would engage the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] that were defending the depot. When the ''Ardent'' arrived, the same Imperial forces would engage it as well.

The frigate would also participate in destroying three space platforms [[XQ1 Platform|XQ1]] ''[[Abrihom]]'', [[XQ2 Platform|XQ2]] ''[[Bersabba]]'' and [[XQ3 Platform|XQ3]] ''[[Cyrlus]]'' and then finally a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Ossus Day (starship)|''Ossus Day'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
